title: Some Tweaks
description: A few improvements for Minecraft, just a few
body:
### This mod is designed to enhance the Minecraft experience without compromising the original essence of the game. Its goal is to add more realistic mechanics and immersive options that bring depth to the gameplay.
## Features implemented
- Realistic health regeneration
- Realistic hunger system
- Option to hide the HUD without hiding the hands (Default key: H)
- Zombie variants (Experimental, disabled by default)
> - Runner Zombie: Higher speed, be careful!
> - Explosive Zombie: Explodes shortly after approaching the player (can be lethal)
> - Armored Zombie: A slow enemy but with more damage than a normal zombie

## Features in development
- Additional animations
- New crafting recipes

## Dependencies
- [ModMenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
- [Cloth Api](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)

## Contact
Got ideas or feedback? Contact me at: m4nusgt@gmail.com
